title: Day 1 - Course Introduction & AI Revolution
description: Introduction to the course, the AI revolution, and the career roadmap.

title: Day 2 - Introduction to Computers & AI Hardware
description: Understanding CPUs, GPUs, TPUs, VRAMs, NPUs, CUDA Cores, and NVIDIA GPU architectures.

title: Day 3 - Internet Basics & APIs
description: Understanding browsers, client-server architectures, DNS, and APIs.

title: Day 4 - SDLC, Product Thinking, & Business Problems
description: Deep dive into Software Development Lifecycle, Product Thinking, and solving Business Problems.

title: Day 5 - Introduction to HLD & Components
description: Understanding High Level Design (HLD) importance and key components (Frontend, Backend, Database, APIs).

title: Day 6 - HLD Mindset Building for AI & Agentic Systems
description: Architect-Level thinking questions training students on problem-solving mindsets and Agentic AI HLD structures.

title: Day 7 - REST APIs, FastAPI, API Design & Agentic AI
description: Architectural thinking for REST APIs, WebSockets, Webhooks, FastAPI, and Agentic AI APIs.

title: Day 8 - HLD Problem Solving Prerequisites
description: Transition from developer to system architect: Functional vs Non-Functional requirements, BOE, DAU, RPS, Scaling, and CAP Theorem.

title: Day 9 - BOE, API Design & HLD Design
description: Architect-Level MCQs on HLD Design Thinking, Requirements, BOE, APIs, and AI Agent Architecture.

title: Day 10 - Schema Design & SQL Databases
description: Introduction to schema, ACID compliance, SQL databases, and PostgreSQL.

title: Day 11 - Cache Systems & Messaging Baselines
description: Deep dive into caching with Redis and message queue systems like Kafka.

title: Schema Design & Cardinality (Reference Quiz)
description: Practice schema relationships, cardinality, and ER diagrams.

title: Day 13 - Talk to Data Agent HLD
description: Comprehensive HLD review session before solving complex system design challenges.

title: Day 14 - WhatsApp HLD + AI Agents
description: Designing high-level real-time messaging architecture, user presence, and AI integrations.

title: Day 15 - WhatsApp E-Commerce Agentic AI Pipeline
description: Designing end-to-end Agentic AI pipelines with RAG, MCP, Multi-Agent systems, and Caching.

title: Day 16 - YouTube HLD + Enterprise Agentic AI
description: Designing YouTube-scale upload pipelines, AWS S3 object storage, and integrating enterprise multi-agent architectures.

title: Day 17 - Enterprise Agentic AI Architecture Design
description: From Traditional Software to AI Native Software: Understanding Planner Agents, Memory, RAG, and Workflow Engines.

title: Day 18 - Design Thinking & Architecture Tools
description: Mastering system design tools: dbdiagram.io for database schemas, Whimsical for fast HLD wireframing, and draw.io for detailed architectures.

title: Day 19 - Intro to Coding (Python)
description: Before diving into Python syntax, we focus heavily on language-neutral logical thinking, algorithms, and the true mindset of an AI Engineer.

title: Day 20 - Coding IDE & Env Setup (UV Package Management)
description: Setting up a professional Python coding environment using modern IDEs, LM Studio, essential Python libraries, and managing dependencies at lightning speed with the UV package manager.

title: Day 21 - Python Fundamentals (Variables, Data Types, if-else)
description: From basic variable assignment to AI Agent routing using if-else logic.

title: Day 22 - Python Loops & Conditional Statements
description: Mastering for and while loops, break, continue, nested loops, and how looping enables complex AI automation and data processing.

title: Day 23 - Data Structures
description: Working with Lists, Dictionaries, Tuples, and Sets in Python.

title: Day 24 - Python OOPs
description: Mastering Object-Oriented Programming in Python: Classes, Objects, Inheritance, Polymorphism, and Encapsulation.

title: Day 25 - Python Libs for AI & Pydantic
description: Essential Python libraries for AI data manipulation and data validation using Pydantic.

title: Day 26 - FastAPI Basics
description: Introduction to FastAPI, routing, and asynchronous web servers.

title: Day 27 - API Design
description: Designing RESTful APIs, request methods, query parameters, and JSON payloads.

title: Day 28 - API Testing with Postman
description: Testing and documenting your FastAPI endpoints using Postman.

title: Day 29 - MCP & openMCP Design
description: Model Context Protocol architecture, building standard tools, and integrating with openMCP.

title: Day 30 - AI Eco-Systems: Claude, ChatGPT & Gemini
description: Exploring the differences, strengths, and ecosystem integrations of Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini.
